name: io.github.codespar/mcp-amazon
description: MCP server for Amazon Selling Partner API (SP-API) — the global marketplace, including Amazon BR/MX/US. Orders, listings, catalog, inventory, reports, finances, fulfillment, notifications.

environmentVariables.name: AMAZON_LWA_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Login with Amazon (LWA) client_id from Seller Central > Developer Central (SP-API app).

environmentVariables.name: AMAZON_REFRESH_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Long-lived seller-authorized refresh_token exchanged for 1-hour LWA access tokens used as x-amz-access-token.

environmentVariables.name: AMAZON_MARKETPLACE_ID
environmentVariables.description: Default marketplace id. BR: A2Q3Y263D00KWC, US: ATVPDKIKX0DER, MX: A1AM78C64UM0Y8, CA: A2EUQ1WTGCTBG2. Required by most endpoints; can be overridden per-call.

environmentVariables.name: AMAZON_REGION
environmentVariables.description: SP-API region: 'na' (default — Americas, incl. BR/US/MX/CA), 'eu' (Europe + India + MENA), 'fe' (Far East — JP/AU/SG).

environmentVariables.name: AMAZON_SELLER_ID
environmentVariables.description: Default sellerId (merchant token) used by Listings endpoints. Can be overridden per-call.
